title: Introduction to Piping
content: This guide covers basic piping concepts, safety practices, and tools used in the trade.

title: Tools and Materials
content: Overview of common tools and materials used in steamfitting and pipefitting.

title: Blueprint Reading
content: How to read and interpret piping blueprints and technical drawings.

title: Pipe Layout and Measurement
content: Techniques for layout, measurement, and cutting pipe to specification.

title: Intermediate Piping Systems
content: Installation and maintenance of commercial and industrial piping systems.

title: Valves and Fittings
content: Types of valves and fittings, applications, and installation procedures.

title: Welding and Joining
content: Welding processes and joining methods for pipe and fittings.

title: Codes and Standards
content: Relevant codes (e.g. ASME, CSA) and how they apply to piping work.

title: Advanced Systems
content: Complex systems including HVAC, process piping, and specialty applications.

title: Troubleshooting and Repair
content: Diagnosing and repairing common piping and system issues.

title: Project Planning
content: Planning, scheduling, and coordinating piping projects.

title: Safety and Documentation
content: Jobsite safety, documentation, and handover requirements.

title: Red Seal Preparation - Theory
content: Key theoretical concepts and code knowledge for Red Seal certification.

title: Red Seal Preparation - Practical
content: Practical skills and procedures commonly assessed on the Red Seal exam.

title: Final Review and Practice
content: Structured review and practice questions for Year 4 and Red Seal readiness.
